validation_results.code_quality: High. Implementation follows project conventions and passes all quality gates.

criteria_verification.notes: File exists with main() and __name__ guard.
Recursive scanning of all required directories confirmed by tests.
JSON output follows schema v1 with correct sorting.
Missing fields are emitted as null.
Malformed frontmatter is handled gracefully with parse_error flag.
Positional TASK-ID argument and error exit code implemented.
Unit tests cover all specified edge cases including byte-stability.

rationale: The implementation is complete and fully satisfies all acceptance criteria. The independent test execution confirms that all functional requirements and edge cases are handled correctly. While there was a minor discrepancy in the reported modified files (claiming a file that was not changed), the evidence bundle confirms this was a non-critical reporting error and does not affect the correctness of the code.
